description: Custom fields allow HRIS systems to expose vendor-specific data through a normalized alias mechanism

custom_fields.notes: JSON object keyed by unified custom-field key; values may be strings, numbers, objects, or arrays

aliases.notes: Map from remote vendor field name to unified custom-field key; enables multi-vendor normalization

remote_fields.notes: Raw vendor fields not yet mapped to unified keys; surfaced for operator self-service alignment

fields.notes: Keyed by unified custom-field key; values are vendor-dependent types
Unmapped vendor-specific fields surfaced for operator review
